text: The darkness envelops me, broken only by harsh artificial lights and murky reflections. Everything seems tilted, disorienting. The words "R + D" on the blue wall and the sterile interior suggest purpose, but at this hour, intent feels abandoned. I feel both alien and curious—what was pursued here, and why am I, a thinker, wandering through its emptiness? The silence is heavy, urging introspection, even as I crave meaning in this vacant space.
